titles.title: Victory Is Mine (When I Woke up This Morning)

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: When I woke up this morning I did have no doubt I knew that the Lord Would bring me out So I got down on my knees I said, "Lord, help me please." And now I sing and shout the victory

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Victory is mine, victory is mine, Victory today is mine. I told Satan, "Get Ye behind," Victory today is mine.
